description_long: This is a tall, rectangular Coca-Cola branded kiosk with a glossy black and red exterior. The front features a large, single glass door with a metallic handle, revealing several interior shelves for product display or storage. The left side is mostly black with a red accent at the top and bottom, while the right side prominently displays the Coca-Cola logo in white script on a red background. The interior is divided into multiple horizontal shelves, and the door appears to be hinged on the left. The top of the kiosk is flat and boxy, with a slight overhang. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use as a refrigerated display or vending unit in urban environments.
description: A tall, rectangular Coca-Cola branded kiosk with a glass door and multiple interior shelves, featuring a glossy black and red finish and prominent logo signage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black exterior with red accents and the open glass door revealing interior shelves.
description_view_1: Front view with the glass door open, exposing the shelving and the main access point for interaction.
description_view_2: Side view with the Coca-Cola logo in white on a red background, and the open door visible to the left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain black and silver surface with no visible signage or openings.
attribute_signage_type: printed logo on right side panel, large white 'Coca-Cola' script on red background
attribute_window_presence: one large rectangular glass door at the front
attribute_door_configuration: one single hinged glass door at the front
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with slight overhang, finished in glossy black and red
